# ner-detector — NER evaluation platform (marfago-labs)

> Pluggable NER backends + gold benchmarks. Primary docs for humans and coding agents.

## Start here

- docs/README.md — documentation index
- docs/for-agents.md — monorepo layout, safety, agent task recipes
- docs/portfolio.md — portfolio brief (maintainer)
- README.md — quick start, limitations, benchmark trade-offs

## Contracts

- docs/configuration.md — `.env`, API keys (`OPENROUTER_API_KEY`, optional `HF_TOKEN`)
- docs/benchmarks.md — metrics (Doc F1 primary), CLI flags
- docs/adr/001-doc-f1-primary-metric.md — why Doc F1 is headline metric
- benchmark/config/compare_backends.yaml — backend × dataset matrix
- benchmark/config/label_maps.yaml — label normalization

## Agent smoke (offline, no API)

uv sync --extra dev
uv run python scripts/agent_smoke.py

## Sibling repos

- https://github.com/marfago-labs/ner-gold-generator — gold generation (llms.txt)
- https://github.com/marfago-labs/ner-dataset — committed JSONL + stats (llms.txt)
